nts1.n: RADIO SUPER W/ ROSA PISTOLA - BALA VOL.I (R)
nts1.d:
RADIO SUPER is Rosa Pistola’s show on NTS where she dives deep into the Latin American underground. Each episode zooms into different genres, scenes, and vibes, tracing their roots and evolution. It’s all about the sounds, the stories, and the pillars of the underground.
From the host: "La Bala is a subgenre of guaracha; it represents its dark, twisted side. This style was born in Colombia, in the coffee-growing region, in places like Cartago and Pereira. It is still a very new genre, and the producers shaping it are extremely young."
Paris-based Mexican DJ and producer Ragazza XXI shares an hour of future facing contemporary electronic music from Mexican artists.

nts1.n: THE EARLY BIRD SHOW W/ JACK ROLLO
The NTS Breakfast Show w/ LUPINI
SOUP TO NUTS W/ SCARY THINGS
NTS GUIDE TO: SACRAMENTO RAP VOL. I (R)

nts2.d: Forager Records is a Los Angeles based record label, committed to unearthing and breathing new life into rare and under appreciated sounds from the past.

nts2.n: Brown Acid Trippin' w/ Lance Barresi & DJ Tara Dactyl
nts2.d:
Life is short, have more fun. Lance Barresi of Permanent Records goes for all vinyl 45's, live and direct from the Los Angeles studio.
From the host: "An alphabetical journey through the Brown Acid Archives. All of these tracks come from real, vintage vinyl 45s released by Hard Rock, Heavy Psych, and Proto-Metal artists beginning with the letter S!”

nts2.n: Cities and Memory -  A Century Of Sound
KRISTIN KONTROL PRESENTS: OUT OF VOGUE (R)

subtle.d: Responsible for “that massive grime tune with the Psycho strings”, UK producers/DJs Trends & Boylan are well versed in what the scene has to offer. They use this platform to showcase music from across the 140 spectrum from Grime to Dubstep. Anything goes!!

subtle.n: Out of Phase With Sam Ling
Gimme Signal radio w/ Kim Öhman

subtle.d: Sessions w/ Amy B is an underground multi-genre music show, showcasing the most prolific guests from all corners of the music industry.

Originally linking up in Wellington and playing shows with the Breaking Beats crew, Swampman and Zero Crumbs have reunited – bringing their smooth mixing and flexible selections to East London. 

In their monthly show, the pair explore the deep, dark, and soulful ends of DNB. Expect fresh underground tunes, deep cut classics, and a bit of banter in Kiwi accents.

subtle.n: Dun Roamin w/ Tomi From Brockley

subtle.d:
Midlands born, London based producer and DJ influenced by UK funky, broken techno, garage and early dubstep. 

Has released on Keysound recordings, RKS, eatmybeat, ec2a, Durkle Disco and Dimsum records

2Step Selects is a monthly show hosted by the Choki Biki Records crew. Founded in Dublin, Ireland, CBR consists of DJ Sharpson, 2step.png, Frame Shift, and MICK. The show consists of an all round breaks, electro, ukg and jungle hour, followed by an Irish showcase, demonstrating all the best Ireland has to offer collective/party/Dj & Producer wise!

Saraphim (aka RNS & RDubz) are two Essex based Producer/DJ’s currently focused on Dubstep & the 140 spectrum, mixing ethnical and grime influences into their music. You can expect anything from deep and melodic meditative vibes to high energy driven music.
London based DJ who enjoys exploring the darker, bassier corners of Jungle, Breaks, Techno and Drum & Bass, especially when it is laced with a bit of acid.

subtle.n: The Ice Box Sessions with Frigid

subtle.d: Hailing from northern Italy, STANDARD is a collective of artists, DJs and producers that aims at the promotion of bass music: Garage, UK Funky, Breaks, Leftfield Bass, Leftfield Techno, Dubstep, everything in between and beyond. They focus on the Italian Bass scene, showcasing new up-and-coming artists as well as established talents from all over the peninsula.

Oddkut is a producer & DJ hailing from Balakovo City, Russia. He's part of the Russian collective "United Gang" who are a Moscow-based community of local musicians, DJ's and promoters teamed up by their genuine love & interest in UK underground music, "TAЭT VREMYA" art group and the creator of the Moscow parties "Judder".

Kishan is a DJ and Producer currently based in London. Actively involved in the music scene already, he produces and mixes a wide range of genres including UK Garage, Drum & Bass, House, Disco and Afrobeat.

dublab.n: Digital Drums OR NO ONE TURNED AWAY
Daddy Differently and Dirty Dave - Things of Life
dublab.d: It’s the simple things isn’t it? The little things of life. Good food, sunshine, no traffic, dark coffee, 72˚ breeze, telephone off the hook and music every Friday morning a la Daddy Differently & Dirty Dave.
Peak Oil records presents ‘tipping point’; a monthly journey through the record collections of brian and brion. Leaving no good genre unturned, enjoy two hours of esoterica, conversation and guests.

dublab.n: Ill Camille x Jesse Fairfax - The Sweeter the Juice
Greg Belson - Divine Chord Gospel Show
Gabie Strong and Ian Wellman - Zone Mapping
Echo Park Film Center - Optical Track
Jennifer Herrema and Kurt Midness - The Banana Question

dublab.d: “Dying Songs focuses on melancholic electronic music but isn’t limited to that. Sometimes it gets dark, sometimes I try to mix techno awkwardly, sometimes i get nostalgic… I like stuff that’s dreamy, ghostly, pretty and sad. I’ll try out new productions of my own, as well. I’m keeping it pretty open and we’ll see how it evolves.” – Jimmy
